leadText: Neuroforce (Japanese: ブレインフォース Brain Force) is an Ability introduced during Generation VII, in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. It is one of the signature Abilities of Necrozma.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon with Neuroforce deal 25% more damage with supereffective moves, regardless of the effectiveness multiplier. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Neuroforce has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon with Neuroforce deal 25% more damage with supereffective moves, regardless of the effectiveness multiplier.
